label: 精准装饰物播撒
description: 以指定坐标为中心在目标区域内播撒一片自然装饰物；若坐标不在目标区域内，BFS 就近吸附到最近的目标格后播撒。
description-en: Scatters natural decorations around a given center coordinate within the target area. If the center is outside the target area, it snaps to the nearest target cell via BFS.
icon: 俯视地形网格，中心点向外辐射散落若干小花草树木符号，绿色装饰点从中心向边缘扩散分布，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: grid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 输入网格列表 (number[][][])，也支持单网格 (number[][]) 自动包装
inputs.description-en: Input list of 2D grids (number[][][]); single grid is auto-wrapped.

inputs.name: decorations
inputs.label: 装饰物清单
inputs.description: 装饰物列表，简化格式 [{名称: 数量}, ...]，如 [{"树木": 5}, {"花草": 3}]；也兼容旧格式 [{decoration, count}]
inputs.description-en: Decoration list: simplified [{name: count}, ...] e.g. [{"tree": 5}]; legacy [{decoration, count}] also accepted.

inputs.name: center
inputs.label: 中心坐标
inputs.description: 播撒中心坐标 [x, y]（列号, 行号）；不填则从目标区域随机选一个点作为中心；若坐标不在目标区域内则自动 BFS 吸附到最近目标格
inputs.description-en: Scatter center [x, y] (column, row). If omitted, a random non-zero cell is used as center. Auto-snaps to nearest target cell via BFS if outside target area.

inputs.name: algorithm
inputs.label: 播撒算法
inputs.description: random=均匀随机；cluster=簇状聚集（近中心密）；ring=环形分布；poisson=泊松盘（间距均匀）；noise=噪声分布
inputs.description-en: Scatter algorithm: random, cluster (dense near center), ring, poisson (even spacing), noise.

inputs.name: scatterRadius
inputs.label: 播撒半径
inputs.description: 以中心坐标为原点的播撒半径（格子数），目标格子必须在此半径内
inputs.description-en: Scatter radius in cells around the center. Only target cells within this radius are candidates.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 表示每次结果不同
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 produces a different result each run.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 输出网格列表
outputs.description: 单值网格的平铺列表：每种装饰物一张，仅含该 id 与 0；与 outputNameList 一一对应
outputs.description-en: Flat list of single-value grids: one per decoration entry (only that id or 0); aligned 1:1 with outputNameList.

outputs.name: outputNameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 与 outputGridList 一一对应的拍平名称清单，格式为 [{id, name, type}]，type 固定为 "asset"
outputs.description-en: Flat name list aligned 1:1 with outputGridList: [{id, name, type}], type is always "asset".

outputs.name: placedCount
outputs.label: 放置数量
outputs.description: 实际成功放置的装饰物格子总数
outputs.description-en: Total number of decoration cells successfully placed.
